name: apache_up
definition: Apache server availability as seen by the exporter. 1=up 0=down. Instant gauge — critical header KPI.
absence_means: Exporter cannot reach Apache mod_status — check /server-status?auto endpoint and exporter logs
cardinality_footguns: One value per instance — no cardinality risk

name: apache_uptime_seconds_total
definition: Cumulative total seconds since Apache last started. Monotonic counter — resets to zero on restart. Use increase() to display current uptime value or rate() to detect restarts (rate near-zero means just restarted).
absence_means: Server not scraped or mod_status endpoint unreachable; distinguish from actual downtime via exporter health
cardinality_footguns: Low cardinality — one value per instance

name: apache_workers (busy)
definition: Number of worker threads/processes currently processing a request. Gauge.
absence_means: Workers metric absent = mod_status not enabled or scrape failure
cardinality_footguns: state attribute has 2 values (busy/idle) — low cardinality
citations: prometheus-community/apache_exporter (confirmed live — state attribute key verified)

name: apache_workers (idle)
definition: Number of worker threads/processes available to accept new requests. Gauge.
citations: prometheus-community/apache_exporter (confirmed live — state attribute key verified)

name: apache_connections
definition: Current open connections by state. Gauge. Has state attribute: closing/keepalive/total/writing.
absence_means: Connections metric absent = scrape failure or mod_status misconfigured

name: apache_processes
definition: Current number of Apache server processes. Gauge. Has state attribute (e.g. running/stopping).
absence_means: Scrape failure or Apache not running

name: apache_accesses_total
definition: Cumulative total HTTP requests handled since last restart. Monotonic counter — use rate() for req/s.
absence_means: No traffic OR scrape failure OR server restarted (rate will spike then reset)
cardinality_footguns: One value per instance — no cardinality risk

name: apache_sent_kilobytes_total
definition: Cumulative kilobytes of data sent by Apache since last restart. Monotonic counter. Unit is KiB (1024 bytes) NOT bytes. Use rate() for KiB/s bandwidth.
absence_means: No traffic OR scrape failure — cross-reference with apache_accesses_total
cardinality_footguns: One value per instance — no cardinality risk
citations: prometheus-community/apache_exporter (confirmed live — unit is KiB not bytes)

name: apache_duration_ms_total
definition: Cumulative total request processing time in milliseconds since last restart. Monotonic counter. rate(duration_ms_total) / rate(accesses_total) = avg request latency in ms/req. Requires ExtendedStatus On.
absence_means: ExtendedStatus not enabled in httpd.conf — metric will be 0 or absent
cardinality_footguns: One value per instance — no cardinality risk

name: apache_cpu_time_ms_total
definition: Cumulative CPU time consumed by Apache in milliseconds. Monotonic counter. Has type attribute (system/user or self/children — verify live values). Use rate() for CPU consumption trend. Requires ExtendedStatus On.
absence_means: ExtendedStatus not enabled OR non-Linux host
cardinality_footguns: type attribute — low cardinality (verify values in Stage 3)
citations: prometheus-community/apache_exporter (confirmed live — context.type attribute key verified)

name: apache_cpuload
definition: Current Apache CPU load as a percentage of one CPU. Gauge. High values indicate CPU-bound request processing. Requires ExtendedStatus On. Can exceed 100% on multi-core systems.
absence_means: ExtendedStatus not enabled — metric will be 0 or absent

name: apache_load
definition: System load average by time interval. Gauge. Has interval attribute with values 1 / 5 / 15 (minutes). System-level metric — NOT Apache-specific CPU. Reflects total host load from /proc/loadavg.
citations: prometheus-community/apache_exporter (confirmed live — context.interval attribute key verified)

name: apache_scoreboard
definition: Apache request processing slots by state from mod_status scoreboard. Gauge. Has state attribute with values: open/waiting/starting/reading/sending/keepalive/logging/finishing/idle_cleanup/closing/dnslookup/unknown.
cardinality_footguns: state has 12 values per instance — low cardinality
citations: prometheus-community/apache_exporter (confirmed live — state attribute key verified)

name: apache_generation
definition: Current server configuration generation count. Gauge. Has type attribute. Increments on graceful restart — use to detect configuration reloads.
citations: prometheus-community/apache_exporter (confirmed live — context.type attribute key verified)

name: apache_exporter_build_info
definition: Prometheus exporter metadata (version goversion goos goarch). Not a service metric — info metric always equals 1. Has build context attributes: branch/goarch/goos/goversion/revision/version.
absence_means: meta/info only — not actionable as dashboard signal

name: apache_version
definition: Apache server version as a label metric. Always 1. Not a service metric.
absence_means: meta/info only — not actionable as dashboard signal

name: apache_info
definition: Apache server information metric with mpm label. Always 1. Has mpm and version attributes useful for discovery but not dashboarding.
widget_suggestions: N/A — meta/info metric only. mpm attribute useful for documentation
absence_means: meta/info only — mpm attribute tells which MPM is in use but value is always 1

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: Apache HTTP Server is self-hosted on-prem / Kubernetes. No per-request cloud cost signal is available from the apache exporter or mod_status. Cost observability (CPU hours / GB memory per pod) requires host-level or Kubernetes metrics outside this integration scope.
absence_means: N/A — self-hosted deployment has no per-request cost metric in scope
